name: Full Name (Common Field)
summary: Reusable full name field using the ADSP common schema $ref definition for person name
whenToUse: Any form that collects a person's full name
When you need first name, middle name, and last name subfields handled automatically
notes: Use the schemaDefinitionTool to load the common schema definitions first
Reference definitions with `$ref` — this renders firstName, middleName, lastName subfields
Replace `yourFullNameProperty` with a meaningful property name like `applicantName`
For name + date of birth together, use `personFullNameAndDob` instead
